case_title: JASON JORDAN VS. CUFF INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF JORDAN, JASON AS TO DEFENDANT CUFF INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
